creator: rz-rpi03@h-ka.de
text:
Created attachment 207536
stack backtrace and show ktr output

(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #14)

With my new USB to RPi serial cable I was able to store the output of a
panic and the following "show ktr". Its size is ~11 Mbyte uncompressed.
Now, via the serial console I am also able to enter commands to the debugger
after a panic.
